stories.headline: Lightning strikes cause fires and damage across Kent and Sussex
stories.description: Six blazes caused by strikes have been dealt with by crews across Kent, East Sussex and West Sussex.

stories.headline: Could Israel’s coming election see an end to Netanyahu’s political career?
stories.description: Israel’s Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu faces mounting political, legal and US pressure ahead of crucial elections.

stories.headline: US, Iran trade strikes: What to know, will it unravel the MoU?
stories.description: As the latest confrontations are aimed at control of the Strait of Hormuz, analysts say the deal is at risk of collapse.

stories.headline: Laura Kuenssberg: Is Andy Burnham Labour’s saviour, or just its best bet?
stories.description: Labour insiders give Laura Kuenssberg their take on the man tipped to replace Keir Starmer as PM.

stories.headline: Unwanted items from Alan Carr's Ayton Castle castle go to auction
stories.description: The sale includes dozens of items from a "concrete menagerie" of animals, figures and rural scenes.
